cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-empty.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o"; test -f "$tmpdir/main.o"; test -d "$tmpdir/main.o.tmp.split"; (! find "$tmpdir/main.o.tmp.split" -name '*_empty.c' -print -quit | grep -q .); test "$(find "$tmpdir/main.o.tmp.split" -name '*.c' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "0" #
